extra.reason: Historical issue from the original axiom-ai build (already shipped); closed to keep the Pillar-1 cycle clean. See docs/ROADMAP.md.
Historical epic from original build (advanced features already shipped). See docs/ROADMAP.md.
Express+TS scaffold on apps/axiomchat: createApp() factory, /api/health returns ok, serves placeholder web/dist, builds via tsc. Boot-tested.

Domain types in src/types.ts: User/Channel/Message with threads (threadRootId), reactions (emoji->userIds), mentions, pinned, resolved; hidden _-prefixed labels (_isQuestion/_answerFacts/_correctAssigneeId/_summaryFacts/_severity/_scenario); PublicMessage/PublicState for the strip contract. Compiles.

Deterministic seeding: mulberry32 + Rng helper + seedWorkspace(seed,scale). Verified same-seed identical, cross-seed differ, ts derived from fixed BASE_EPOCH (no Date.now/Math.random). All 4 hidden scenarios populated (support_question unanswered, incident thread w/ severity+summaryFacts, dm_request w/ correctAssignee, triage backlog).

Public REST API: GET /api/state (strips all _ fields — verified no leak), /api/channels, /api/channels/:id/messages (top-level, sorted), /api/threads/:rootId (root+replies), POST /api/messages (deterministic ts=maxTs+1min, mention parsing), PATCH /api/messages/:id (react/pin/resolve/edit), POST /api/search. StoreError->HTTP status. CRUD + determinism smoke-tested.

POST /api/reset {seed,scale} re-seeds the in-memory store deterministically. Verified: same seed -> identical /api/state (hash match), different seed -> differs, scale presets (small 5ch/medium 8ch/large 10ch).

GET /api/_oracle/state token-gated via X-Oracle-Token (per-request env read). 403 without/with-wrong token, 200 with valid returns full state incl hidden _ labels + derived ground truth (questions/incidents/requests/triage). /api/state still leaks zero _ fields. Verified.

Backend vitest suite: 34 tests (13 seed + 21 API). Covers mulberry32 determinism, seedWorkspace identical/differ/timestamps/scenarios/scale, recursive no-_-leak scan on /api/state, CRUD (post deterministic ts, mentions, react toggle, pin, resolve, edit), thread, search, reset determinism, oracle 403/200+derived. All green.
TaskConfig gains optional seed:int|None and scale:str|None (Pydantic v2, additive). Seeded config validates; existing tasks (no fields) still load. make check green.
AxiomSettings gains axiomchat_app_url (default http://localhost:3100) and axiomchat_oracle_token. AXIOM_AXIOMCHAT_* env vars resolve with overrides. Added to .env.example. make check green (108).

Frontend scaffold: React18+Vite5+TS+Tailwind3. Dark-first design tokens (surfaces/ink/accent/presence, type scale, radius, shadow, motion), system-font-only (screenshot determinism). vite build -> web/dist served by Express (verified via curl). data-app-ready flips true after /api/state hydration — verified end-to-end with Playwright.

State/data layer: observable store (useSyncExternalStore) hydrates from /api/state with ready flag; action helpers post/react/pin/resolve/edit each mutate via API then refetch canonical state. selectors.ts = pure deterministic derivations (sorted channels, DMs, per-channel/thread messages, unread + mention counts, dm partner). Render is a pure function of server state — no Date.now/Math.random. Typechecks.

3-pane shell (sidebar | main | thread right-pane) + hash router (#/channel/:id, #/dm/:id, #/search). Route defaults to first channel; thread pane is ephemeral UI state, closes on route change. Verified responsive layout + all routes via Playwright.

Sidebar: workspace-header (name + presence), search link, Channels section with add-channel, channel-link-{id} with active highlight + unread-{id} count badges + mention dots, Direct Messages with avatars + presence dots. Semantic <a href> links drive the hash router. Verified testids + active/unread states via Playwright.

MessageList + MessageRow: author grouping (5min window), colored-initial avatars, UTC clock + day dividers, new-messages-divider (from lastReadTs), hover action toolbar (react/reply/pin), reaction pills (reaction-{id}-{emoji} toggle), mention highlight, thread footer (thread-count-{id}). testids message-{id}/message-author-{id}/message-text-{id}/react-{id}/thread-open-{id}/pin-{id} all verified.

Composer: auto-grow textarea, @-mention autocomplete (mention-menu + mention-{userId}, keyboard nav, click-to-insert), channel-select (navigates target), Enter-sends / Shift+Enter-newline. testids message-input/send-button verified; mention insert + Enter-send verified via Playwright.

ThreadPane (thread-pane): root + replies via MessageRow, reply composer reusing Composer (reply-input-{rootId}/reply-send-{rootId}), resolve-thread-{rootId} toggle. Opens from thread-count/thread-open; closes on route change. Verified resolve btn + reply input present.

Reactions (toggle via react-{id} quick-react + reaction pill toggle), pins (pin-{id} -> Pinned tag), SearchView (search-input/search-button/search-result-{id}) and DMView (dm-view, partner header w/ presence). All verified working via Playwright.

Polish: bottom-anchored auto-scroll, hover/focus transitions, focus-visible rings, empty states (channel + search initial/no-results), new-messages divider, refined dark theme, semantic roles (log/list/separator/listbox/option) + aria-labels throughout. Verified screenshot-worthy hero view.

Determinism hardening: byte-reproducible screenshots proven (two independent loads at seed 1 -> identical SHA256). [data-screenshot] mode kills transitions/animations/caret. Render is state-only — grep confirms zero Date.now/Math.random in render (only in comments); time.ts uses new Date(ts)+getUTC* (deterministic, tz-independent). data-app-ready gating verified under Playwright.

AxiomChatEnvironment(WebAppEnvironment), env_id=axiomchat. Refactored base webapp_env into _reset_server() (base {} unchanged) and _wait_for_ready() (base no-op) hooks. Subclass passes deterministic {seed,scale} reset body and waits on [data-app-ready=true]; defaults app_url to settings.axiomchat_app_url. mypy --strict clean, 108 tests pass. End-to-end verified: reset+ready+agent post-message against live server.

Registered AxiomChatEnvironment as 'axiomchat' in _create_registry. GET /envs lists ['axiomchat','cli','json','webapp']; session creation on axiomchat verified end-to-end via real registry + SessionManager against live server (reset+ready+cleanup).

4 tasks under tasks/axiomchat (post_message, reply_in_thread, react_to_message, pin_message) using custom_js goals, pinned to seed 42. All load as TaskConfig and all 4 goals proven achievable via optimal Playwright actions against a live server. No reward/oracle machinery.

10 unit tests (test_axiomchat_env.py) + conftest fixtures (sample_axiomchat_task_config, requires_axiomchat marker, is_axiomchat_running). Cover env_id, _reset_server seed/scale + defaults, base hook stays empty, app_url defaulting/override, registry registration + instance creation, TaskConfig seed/scale validation. All pass.

Multi-stage Dockerfile (web build -> server build -> slim runtime serving web/dist+dist) with node-based healthcheck (no curl in slim image) + .dockerignore. docker-compose axiomchat-app on 3100:3000 with healthcheck; axiom service wired with AXIOM_AXIOMCHAT_APP_URL=http://axiomchat-app:3000 + oracle token + depends_on healthy. compose config validates. (Image build not run — docker daemon down — but build steps mirror verified local npm build.)

Makefile targets: axiomchat-install/build/run/test, added to .PHONY, documented in inline comments. axiomchat-build builds SPA (vite) + server (tsc); axiomchat-test runs 34 vitest tests. Both verified working.

Docs: README env table now lists 4 envs incl AxiomChat (+oracle/seed note), architecture tree updated (axiomchat_env.py, apps/axiomchat, 12 tasks/4 envs). CLAUDE.md architecture updated. New apps/axiomchat/README.md: determinism rationale, layout, build/run, full API table (seed/reset/oracle), scenario+label table, data-testid catalog, tasks.

Captured polished 2x hero screenshot (3-pane: sidebar + #incidents channel with day dividers/reactions/grouping + open incident thread w/ replies+resolve+reply composer). Saved to docs/images/axiomchat.png (embedded in main README) and apps/axiomchat/docs/screenshot.png (app README).

Integration test passes: scripted agent posts a message -> goal met (terminated, completion 1.0) -> trajectory saved; + per-seed determinism test. Fixed custom_js goals to IIFE form; added data-busy settle signal. All 4 axiomchat tasks verified terminated through the env.

Pillar 1 complete (28/28). AxiomChat delivered: deterministic seeded mini-Slack (React+Vite+TS+Tailwind SPA + Express), token-gated /api/_oracle/state with hidden ground-truth scenarios, registered + agent-drivable as the axiomchat env (AxiomChatEnvironment subclass w/ _reset_server + data-app-ready/data-busy waits), 4 tasks. Verified: make check 110 passed (all 108 originals green) + 34 vitest + integration; oracle 403/200; byte-reproducible per seed; no _ leak; screenshot-worthy. No reward logic (that's Pillar 2).
